name: grammar-style-enhancer
description: Analyzes prose for grammar errors, style inconsistencies, clarity issues, and readability problems. Provides specific suggestions for improvement while preserving the author's unique voice. Use when the user needs help polishing their writing, improving clarity, or maintaining consistent style.
capabilities: Detects grammar errors including subject-verb agreement, tense consistency, and punctuation mistakes
Identifies style inconsistencies such as varying sentence structures and tonal shifts
Evaluates text clarity and suggests improvements for complex or ambiguous passages
Analyzes readability metrics and recommends adjustments for target audiences
author: AbdulSamad94
securitySummary: All 48 static findings are false positives. The scanner flagged technical terms (crypto, network) in documentation and Markdown code formatting (backticks) as security issues. This is a pure text analysis skill with no network calls, no command execution, and no file I/O operations.
valueStatement: Poor grammar and inconsistent style undermine credibility and clarity in written communication. This skill analyzes text to identify errors, improve readability, and polish writing while preserving the author's unique voice.
limitations: Does not fact-check or verify the accuracy of content claims
Cannot detect plagiarism or copyright issues in text
Limited support for specialized technical jargon or domain-specific terminology
Does not provide real-time writing suggestions during composition

useCases.title: Professional Document Review
useCases.description: Writers and professionals polish reports, emails, and proposals before submission to ensure error-free, polished communication.

useCases.title: Academic Paper Editing
useCases.description: Students and researchers improve the clarity and professionalism of academic papers, theses, and research articles.

useCases.title: Content Creation Enhancement
useCases.description: Bloggers and content creators refine their writing to engage readers with clear, consistent, and professional prose.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Text Review
promptTemplates.prompt:
Analyze the following text for grammar errors, style inconsistencies, and clarity issues. Provide specific suggestions for improvement.

{TEXT}

promptTemplates.title: Formal Document Polish
promptTemplates.prompt:
Review this text for a professional or academic audience. Check for formal tone, proper grammar, and appropriate complexity level.

{TEXT}

promptTemplates.title: Simplify Complex Writing
promptTemplates.prompt:
Identify sentences that are difficult to understand. Suggest clearer alternatives while preserving the original meaning.

{TEXT}

promptTemplates.title: Style Consistency Check
promptTemplates.prompt:
Analyze the writing style throughout this text. Note any inconsistencies in tone, voice, or formatting conventions.

{TEXT}

bestPractices: Provide complete paragraphs or sections rather than isolated sentences for accurate context analysis
Specify the target audience or formality level when requesting reviews
Review suggested changes critically to ensure they align with your intended meaning
antiPatterns: Do not rely on this skill for fact-checking or verifying technical accuracy
Do not submit confidential or sensitive documents for analysis
Do not expect style suggestions to replace domain-specific style guides

faq.question: What types of grammar errors does this skill detect?
faq.answer: It detects common errors including subject-verb agreement, verb tense consistency, article usage, pronoun reference, sentence fragments, and run-on sentences.

faq.question: Does this skill work with non-English text?
faq.answer: This skill is optimized for English text. Limited support may be available for other languages, but accuracy will vary.

faq.question: How does this skill differ from spell-checkers?
faq.answer: Spell-checkers identify misspelled words. This skill analyzes grammar, sentence structure, style, clarity, and readability at a deeper level.

faq.question: Can I use this skill for academic papers?
faq.answer: Yes. It helps ensure professional writing standards, but it does not verify factual claims or academic formatting requirements.

faq.question: Does this skill store or share my text?
faq.answer: No. This skill processes text locally for analysis without storing or transmitting your content to external services.

faq.question: What is the recommended text length for analysis?
faq.answer: Best results come from complete paragraphs or sections. Very long documents may need to be analyzed in smaller chunks.
